---
title: "Pierre-Louis Barbarant"
about:
  template: solana
  image: assets/profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/pbarbarant
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/plbarbarant/
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/pilou.ba/
---

Graduate student in statistics and computer vision mainly interested in 
optimal transport, topological data analysis, 3D geometry and their implications
in machine learning.

## 📚 Education

- MRes in Computer Vision | *Sorbonne University* |
  2022 - 2023 | Paris FR

- MEng in Statistics and Economics | *ENSAE Paris* |
  2020 - 2024 | Paris FR


## ✏️ Experience

- *Paris Brain Institute* | Research collaborator | 2022 - 2023

- *Pasteur Institute* | Research intern | Summer 2021
